value: I hear your frustration—crew logistics issues that delay flights are genuinely aggravating, especially when the plane is ready to go. While we appreciate you acknowledging our response, I understand that doesn't solve the core problem of getting you where you need to be on time. Since this involves SkyWest operations, I'd recommend reaching out to them directly about scheduling and staffing concerns, as those decisions fall outside our control. That said, if there's anything we can help with on our end regarding your booking or experience, please let me know.
